entries.title: Lecturer, Department of Civil Engineering
entries.organization: University of Information, Technology and Sciences, Bangladesh
bullets: Conducted Courses: Surveying, Water Supply Engineering, GIS and Remote Sensing Lab, Pollution Management, Environmental Engineering Lab.

entries.title: GIS Engineer (Part Time)
bullets: Collecting, monitoring and analyzing geospatial data.

entries.title: Graduate Research Assistant
bullets: Working on emission and non-emission modelling of vehicles

entries.title: Undergraduate Thesis
bullets: Investigated the abundance and characteristics of microplastics (MPs) in landfill sites.
Used microscopy, FT-IR, and SEM-EDS for MPs identification and characterization.

entries.title: Masters of Applied Science in Civil Engineering
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering
bullets: Thesis: Assessment of Microplastics Pollution from Municipal Solid Waste Landfill Sites: A Comparative Study of Controlled and Open Landfills in Bangladesh
Supervisor: Prof. Dr. Md. Rezaul Karim

entries.title: Research Project on Irrigation Water Management and Web-based Agricultural Information System in Bangladesh
bullets: Conducted photogrammetry survey and analyzed geospatial data of 11 districts for agricultural land use mapping.

entries.title: Final Year Design Project (FYDP)
bullets: Applied comprehensive applications of theoretical civil engineering knowledge for simulated practical problems of a residential area in an urban setting.

entries.title: Faculty Moderator
bullets: Supervised the club members for their endeavors of the club

entries.title: Vice-President
bullets: Organized workshops and sessions, fostering collaboration among 100+ participants.

entries.title: Director (Senior)
bullets: Oversaw operations, facilitated academic discussions, and mentored students.

entries.title: Operations Manager
bullets: Managed operations and supported community outreach projects.
